_meta.note: Proposed restructure: courses/ → ~c/, digests/ → ~d/, soft-reading dirs at root. File paths reflect CURRENT on-disk locations until migration.

xcs229.title: XCS229 Course Overview
xcs229.description: Stanford SCPD XCS229 — full course companion. Linear regression through RL.

linear-algebra.title: Linear Algebra
linear-algebra.description: Vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, SVD — foundations for ML coursework.

linear-regression.title: Linear Regression
linear-regression.description: LMS algorithm, gradient descent, normal equations, probabilistic interpretation.

logistic-regression.title: Logistic Regression
logistic-regression.description: Binary classification, sigmoid, maximum likelihood, Newton's method.

glm.title: Generalized Linear Models
glm.description: Exponential family, canonical form, constructing GLMs, softmax regression.

generative-algorithms.title: Generative Algorithms
generative-algorithms.description: GDA, Naive Bayes, Laplace smoothing, text classification.

svm-kernels.title: SVMs & Kernel Methods
svm-kernels.description: Margins, kernel trick, Mercer's theorem, SMO.

decision-trees-ensemble.title: Decision Trees & Ensembles
decision-trees-ensemble.description: Information gain, Gini, pruning, bagging, random forests, boosting.

neural-networks.title: Neural Networks
neural-networks.description: Deep learning, forward/back propagation, modern modules.

unsupervised.title: Unsupervised Learning
unsupervised.description: K-means, mixture of Gaussians, EM algorithm, factor analysis.

bias-variance.title: Bias-Variance & Regularization
bias-variance.description: Bias-variance tradeoff, double descent, regularization, model selection.

reinforcement-learning.title: Reinforcement Learning
reinforcement-learning.description: MDPs, value/policy iteration, LQR, DDP, policy gradient.

ps1.title: XCS229 Problem Set 1
ps1.description: 25 points — GLM convexity, feature maps, stability.

ps3.title: XCS229 Problem Set 3
ps3.description: 35 points — Poisson regression, kernel methods, perceptron.

ps4.title: XCS229 Problem Set 4
ps4.description: 50 points — KL divergence, MNIST, spam, double descent.

transformers.title: Transformers
transformers.description: Attention Is All You Need. Slide deck with worked examples.

kv-cache.title: KV Cache
kv-cache.description: KV cache internals — deep dive, guide, and slide deck.

kernel-methods.title: Kernel Methods
kernel-methods.description: Feature maps, the kernel trick, Mercer's theorem.

xcs236.title: XCS236 Course Overview
xcs236.description: Stanford SCPD XCS236 — autoregressive to diffusion.

intro.title: Introduction to Generative Models
intro.description: Density estimation, taxonomy, MLE, sampling, evaluation.

autoregressive.title: Autoregressive Models
autoregressive.description: NADE, MADE, PixelCNN, WaveNet, Transformer LMs.

vae.title: Variational Autoencoders
vae.description: VAE architecture, ELBO loss, VQ-VAE, posterior collapse.

normalizing-flows.title: Normalizing Flows
normalizing-flows.description: Change of variables, RealNVP, GLOW, Neural ODE.

ebm.title: Energy-Based Models
ebm.description: Energy functions, Boltzmann distribution, MCMC, RBMs.

score-based.title: Score-Based Models
score-based.description: Score matching, NCSN, Langevin dynamics, SDEs.

diffusion.title: Diffusion Models
diffusion.description: DDPM, DDIM, classifier-free guidance, Stable Diffusion.

agentic-llm-survey.title: Agentic LLM Survey
agentic-llm-survey.description: Survey of agentic LLMs — reason/act/interact taxonomy.

trending-ai.title: Trending AI Papers
trending-ai.description: Agentic Benchmarks, Reasoning Models, Multimodal Agents, Mamba-3.

ml-blog.title: ML Blog Project
ml-blog.description: Self-directed ML learning through blog writing.

block-universe.title: Block Universe & Retrocausality
block-universe.description: Wave function collapse, block universe, eternalism, retrocausality.

nonlinear-time.title: Non-linear Time
nonlinear-time.description: Argumentative essay weaving sci-fi and physics on nonlinear time.

time-travel-fiction.title: Time Travel in Fiction
time-travel-fiction.description: Sci-fi time travel mapped to physics — Wells, Nolan, Vonnegut, Heinlein.

retrocausal-emotion.title: Retrocausality, Hope & Depression
retrocausal-emotion.description: A writer's physics — block universe, bidirectional causation, and prospective psychology as lenses on hope, depression, and healing.

brain-energy.title: Brain Energy & Metabolic Theory
brain-energy.description: Metabolic theory of mental illness, neuroscience.

poetry-syllabus.title: Poetry Study Syllabus
poetry-syllabus.description: 45-day structured poetry study — poet by poet.

project-hail-mary.title: Project Hail Mary
project-hail-mary.description: Andy Weir's sci-fi novel — astrophage crisis, first contact, Rocky.

audhd.title: ADHD / ASD / AuDHD
audhd.description: Diagnostic criteria, comorbidity, coping strategy frameworks.

how-to-know-a-person.title: How to Know a Person
how-to-know-a-person.description: David Brooks — illuminators vs. diminishers, deep listening.

wellbeing.title: Personal Wellbeing
wellbeing.description: Mental health arc, resilience, turning points.

attachment-theory.title: Attachment Theory
attachment-theory.description: Bowlby, Ainsworth, adult attachment, polyvagal theory — and the critique. Useful rather than true.

daily.title: Daily Digests
daily.description: Daily AI/ML research, news, and agent trends.

xcs229-lectures.title: XCS229 Lecture Topics
xcs229-lectures.description: All CS229 lecture topics — linear regression through RL.

scpd-ml-course.title: SCPD ML Course
scpd-ml-course.description: Stanford ML course — overviews, foundations, supplementary.

xcs236-lectures.title: XCS236 Lecture Topics
xcs236-lectures.description: All CS236 lecture topics — autoregressive through diffusion.

deep-learning.title: Deep Learning
deep-learning.description: Neural architectures from CNNs to attention internals.

physics-of-time.title: Physics of Time
physics-of-time.description: Block universe, retrocausality, and the nature of time.

ai-landscape.title: AI Landscape
ai-landscape.description: Research papers, surveys, and daily trend tracking.
